$note: Contract surface @adhd/agent-registry exposes to downstream plans. Updated for Decision 5 (decisions.md): component identity (registry_components) is split from version history (registry_component_versions) so the four component references are DB-enforced FKs. This file records the corrected component/contract shape; it does NOT alter any state.json/dag.json.

registry_prompt_types.note: Seeded lookup table, text PK, not a SQL enum [inv:lookup-not-enum].

columns: type TEXT NOT NULL → FK registry_prompt_types.slug (enforced)
is_shared INTEGER(bool) NOT NULL default false
registry_components.note: type and is_shared are identity-level facts; they do not change per version.

columns: version_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT (single-column surrogate, FK-able)
slug TEXT NOT NULL → FK registry_components.slug (enforced)

registry_agent_components.note: version_pin stores a version_id, not a human version number. component_slug + version_pin are TWO separate FKs, not one composite FK (a composite FK with a nullable column is not enforced in SQLite).

registry_composed_prompts.note: component_versions records human version numbers (not version_id) — a human-readable audit map (Decision 5).

ComponentStore.create({slug,type,content,isShared?}): inserts head + version-1 atomically; returns PromptComponent (now incl. versionId)
ComponentStore.read(slug): head joined to its latest version
ComponentStore.readVersion(slug, n): head joined to a specific version
ComponentStore.version(slug, newContent): appends a registry_component_versions row at max(version)+1; head unchanged
ComponentStore.list({type?,shared?}): latest version of each component (head ⋈ latest version)

CompositionStore.attach({agentSlug,componentSlug,position: versionPin = a version_id; pinVersion = a human version resolved to its version_id
CompositionStore.resolveComposition(agentSlug, ctx): ordered, filtered ResolvedComponent[]; pin resolves by version_id, else latest; semantics unchanged from pre-split

types.PromptComponent: { slug, type, version, versionId, content, isShared, createdAt, updatedAt } — versionId added by Decision 5
